{{Quote|OOM-9, we are commencing flanking maneuvers on the Naboo.|EEK-176|audio=EEK-176.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
'''EEK-176''' was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] manufactured to serve in the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the Trade Federation [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], and EEK-176 participated in the initial landing on the world by leading a group of [[Battle droid/Legends|droids]] to assist [[OOM command battle droid/Legends|command battle droid]] [[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9]] in the attack of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Vis/Legends|Vis]] and other nearby towns.

==Biography==
{{Quote|We have secured New Centrif.|EEK-176|audio=NewCentrifSecure.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
EEK-176 was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]<ref name="GB" /> who was given [[Gender/Legends|masculine programming]].<ref name="Databank" /> Like all B1 battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]], EEK-176 served in the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] corporation known as the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the Trade Federation launched a full-scale [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. During the Federation's landing on Naboo, EEK-176 commanded a group of droids that landed south of the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Vis/Legends|Vis]] aboard a [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979 landing craft]].<ref name="GB" />

[[File:EEK-176_forces.png|thumb|right|300px|EEK-176's forces arriving in Vis]]
The Droid [[Army/Legends|Army]] targeted Vis because of its [[Transmitter/Legends|transmitter]], which, if not destroyed, would allow the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|people of Naboo]] to spread word of the invasion back to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], damaging the Federation's plans. EEK-176 waited for [[OOM command battle droid/Legends|command battle droid]] [[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9]] to reach the city, and upon his arrival both droids began a flanking maneuver on Vis from the east and south. The Federation droids overcame the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Naboo soldiers]] in the city and destroyed the Vis transmitter. EEK-176's droids later assisted OOM-9 in taking two other cities that housed transmitters, [[New Centrif]] and [[Parrlay]], preventing the Naboo from contacting the Republic.<ref name="GB" />

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|We have secured Vis.|EEK-176|audio=VisSecure.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
EEK-176 was given command of a small group of droids, which included three [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]], four B1-series battle droids, and four beetle droids in the Trade Federation Army. With that small force it was able to successfully assist OOM-9 in his attack on Vis.<ref name="GB" /> Like all B1 battle droids, EK-176 wielded an [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]] and was 1.91 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="Databank" /> The droid's head and some other parts of its body were [[Color/Legends|colored]] white, while the rest was brown.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I am sending EEK-176 to replace you at Harte Secur.|Nute Gunray in cut dialogue|audio=EEK-176Replacement.flac|<ref name="GB" />}}
EEK-176 first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', in which it was voiced by [[Murphy Dunn]]. In the first level of the Trade Federation campaign, entitled "Beachhead," the player attacks Vis, and EEK-176's voice is heard telling OOM-9 that its forces are flanking Vis. In the game's level editor, EEK-176 is a unique character that can be placed in custom-made player levels. An unused audio file from the end of the second Trade Federation level; "Behind the Lines," has [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] reward OOM-9 for his [[Capture of Harte Secur|victory]] in [[Harte Secur]] by reassigning him to the [[invasion of Spinnaker]], sending EEK-176 to replace him.<ref name="GB" />
